title: Living in Boulder vlog 7-  19 - 2017: Bike Fit

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about getting a bike fit and picking up cycling accessories in Boulder, including aero bars, water bottle cages, and handlebar mounts. He shares plans to time himself on a 20km course and work toward riding to the top of nearby mountains.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: wants multiple bags, aero bars, and water bottle cages optimized for different ride distances
plans to time himself repeatedly on the same course to figure out best gear configuration
wants to ride to the top of a mountain and back, training incrementally by riding as far as possible each time
